visuals.title: Machine Learning Process Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Machine Learning Process Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Need for and Fundamentals of Machine Learning</text>

  <!-- Data Input -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Data Input
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Algorithm -->
  <rect x="180" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="230" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Algorithm
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Model -->
  <rect x="310" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="360" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Model
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow 1 -->
  <line x1="150" y1="80" x2="180" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <polygon points="180,80 175,75 175,85" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Arrow 2 -->
  <line x1="280" y1="80" x2="310" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <polygon points="310,80 305,75 305,85" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Output -->
  <rect x="180" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="230" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Prediction
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow 3 -->
  <line x1="230" y1="100" x2="230" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <polygon points="230,150 225,145 235,145" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Feedback Loop -->
  <path d="M230 190 C230 220, 330 220, 330 190" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="5,5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="330,190 325,185 335,185" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <text x="280" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Feedback Loop
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Key Concepts -->
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Key Concepts: Data, Patterns, Learning, Prediction
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Applications -->
  <text x="210" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Applications: Image Recognition, Natural Language Processing, Forecasting
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
